qa_summary.model_case: EN-asset-is-English (en.json holds English, EN asset text is English). JP primary via ja.json; EN asset used purely as structural authority; EN text fields replaced with Vietnamese.

character_voice_qa.Commander_司令官_or_しれーかんさま: Translated as 'Chỉ Huy' in all instances (Alicia & Mil dialogue, narration).
character_voice_qa.Myrtille_ミルティーユ: Female baker; self-refers as 'Mil'; romanized 'Myrtille' when addressed by Captain. Ôn/anh ↔ em voice toward Chỉ Huy.
character_voice_qa.Alicia_アリシア: Female; em/anh toward Chỉ Huy; energetic.
character_voice_qa.大熊_Bear: Bear SFX *growl*/Gaau localized to Vietnamese onomatopoeia 'Gâu/Gừ/Gâu u' (intentional change so verifier does not flag kept-English).
character_voice_qa.townsfolk_街の人ABCD / 兵士: Speaker labels kept byte-identical JP; dialogue translated naturally into Vietnamese.

linguistic_qa.title_case: Title 'Vỗ Về Bằng Bánh Ngọt Ngào' and both messageTextCenter cards in Vietnamese Title Case.
linguistic_qa.ascii_comma_replaced: All in-field commas rendered as U+201A '‚' to protect delimiter integrity.
linguistic_qa.h18_confirmed: Project has confirmed all characters 18+; no H-18 content in this scene, so standard translation applied.

breaks, and %user% placeholder preserved byte-for-byte vs EN asset.

issues_and_notes: 4 diff rows show JP '(n/a)': the 2 <size=48> cards and 2 bear-SFX lines have no JP key in en.json (title/card/SFX only exist in EN asset). VI sourced from ja.json + EN asset directly.
Bear growls localized (Gâu/Gừ) rather than kept as English 'Gaau/*growl*' — intentional localization logged in manifest notes.
No structural or kept-English failures. Independent verifier PASS is authoritative.
